query:
SELECT university_name, COUNT(*) as professor_count 
FROM professors 
GROUP BY university_name 
ORDER BY professor_count DESC, university_name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT university_name, COUNT(*) as professor_count 
FROM professors 
GROUP BY university_name 
ORDER BY professor_count DESC, university_name;
stdout:
university_name	professor_count
